Limit the temperature input to RRTMGP so that they fall into the lookup table range

title: limit temperature for radiation

body: Removes one of the pending `bycolumn` operations from the vertical diffusion Frierson function. `colidx` is still used in some tendency calculations (gravity wave, external forcing)
title: Remove `bycol` ops in vertical diffusion function
